# Potion of Binding

## Observed Text

- Apply 1 Weak and 1 Vulnerable to ALL enemies.

---
<!-- META-AGENT NOTES — do not edit above this line -->
## Strategy Notes

- Premium elite/boss potion when both mitigation and burst matter; especially useful against multi-enemy fights and boss turns where Weak/Vulnerable timing is more valuable than raw damage.
- Spend before a scaling hallway becomes lethal if Weak plus Vulnerable both prevents the dangerous turn and enables a kill; do not hold it blindly for bosses.
